hero.description: Horizon Tech ikambani yepasi rose yetekinoroji inotungamirwa muSarajevo, ichiendesa yekucheka-kumucheto software mhinduro kumabhizinesi mumakondinendi matatu.

mission.title: Basa
mission.description: Isu tinobatsira masangano kushandura mazano ane chishuwo kuita zvigadzirwa zvemadhijitari zvakavimbika zvinogadzira kukosha kwebhizinesi kunoyerwa.
points: Enzanisa tekinoroji kuendesa nemhedzisiro yakajeka yebhizinesi.
Vaka masisitimu enguva refu anoramba achichengetedzwa sezvo zvikwata zvichikura.
Batana padhuze nevatori vechikamu kubva pazano kusvika pakuuraya.

expertise.title: Unyanzvi
expertise.description: Zvikwata zvedu zvakasiyana-siyana zvinosanganisa kudzika kweinjiniya nekufunga kwechigadzirwa pane yazvino tekinoroji stacks.
points: Cloud architecture, DevOps otomatiki, uye resilient zvivakwa.
Yakashandiswa AI / ML, data workflows, uye IoT-inogoneswa zvigadzirwa.

approach.title: Nzira
approach.description: Isu tinoita neyakajeka, iterative modhi iyo inochengeta kuendesa ichifungidzirwa uku ichideredza njodzi yechigadzirwa.
points: Tsvaga: tsanangura chiyero, zvinokosheswa, uye kubudirira metric pakutanga.
Kuvaka: Zvikepe mune zvakanangana zvinowedzera nekuenderera mberi mhinduro loops.
Optimize: Ongorora mhedzisiro uye uvandudze mashandiro nekufamba kwenguva.

cta.title: Wagadzirira kushandura bhizinesi rako?
cta.description: Joinha runyorwa rukuru rwemakambani anovimba neHorizon Tech kuendesa mhinduro nyowani uye mhedzisiro yakasarudzika.

hero.title: Taura nesu
hero.description: Une purojekiti mupfungwa? Tinoda kunzwa kubva kwauri. Dzvanya pano kuti uone kuti tingakubatsira sei kuunza pfungwa dzako kuhupenyu.

form.title: Titumirei meseji
form.success: Ndinokutendai neshoko renyu. Tichadzoka kwauri mukati maawa 24-48.
form.error: Chimwe chinhu chakakanganisika. Ndapota edza zvakare kana kutitumira email zvakananga.
form.subject: Musoro wenyaya *

placeholders.name: Zita rako
placeholders.subject: Chii chatingabatsira nacho?
placeholders.message: Ndokumbira utiudze nezve yako yekubvunza kana kubvunza ...

validation.messageMinLength: Meseji inofanira kunge iri {{count}} mavara akareba.

reasons: AI / ML uye Cloud Architecture Nyanzvi

custom.title: Tsika Mhinduro
custom.description: Kutsvaga nzira yakasarudzika yekugadzirisa? Isu tinoshanda padhuze nevatengi kuti tinzwisise zvakasarudzika zvinodiwa uye kuendesa tsika software inotyaira mhedzisiro inoyerwa.

faq.title: Une mimwe mibvunzo?
faq.description: Tarisa uone chikamu chedu cheFAQ kuti uwane mhinduro dzinokurumidza

hero.description: Chikwata chakasiyana chetekinoroji, vagadziri, uye strategists vachivaka zvigadzirwa zvemadhijitari zvepamusoro-soro pamwechete.

section.title: Chikwata chehutungamiriri
section.description: Vatungamiriri vane ruzivo vanotungamira chiono cheHorizon Tech uye kukura

hamza.bio: Mutungamiri wekuona uye mugadziri wehunyanzvi ane makore 10+ mubhizinesi software, nyanzvi muAI / ML, mapuratifomu egore, uye scalable chigadzirwa chigadzirwa.

ahmet.bio: Cybersecurity nyanzvi yakanangana nebhizinesi rekuchengetedza dhizaini, yakachengeteka pane-prem zvivakwa, uye kutevedzera-kutanga kuendesa kwenzvimbo dzinodzorwa.

culture.title: Hupenyu paHorizon Tech
culture.description: Isu tinosimudzira tsika yehunyanzvi, kushandira pamwe, uye kuenderera mberi nekudzidza

remoteFirst.title: Kure-Kutanga Tsika
remoteFirst.description: Shanda kubva chero kupi zvako nemaawa anochinjika uye tarisa pamhedzisiro, kwete nzvimbo.

collaborative.title: Nharaunda yekudyidzana
collaborative.description: Zviitiko zvechikwata zvenguva dzose, zvikamu zvekugovana ruzivo, uye muchinjikwa-unoshanda kubatana.

workLife.title: Basa-Hupenyu Balance
workLife.description: Rupo zororo mutemo, rutsigiro rwehutano hwepfungwa, uye kuremekedza nguva yemunhu.

innovation.title: Innovation Nguva
innovation.description: 20% nguva yemapurojekiti emunhu, hackathons, uye kuongorora matekinoroji matsva.

cta.title: Unoda kujoina timu yedu?
cta.description: Isu tinogara tichitsvaga vanhu vane tarenda vane hanya nehunyanzvi, varidzi, uye hunyanzvi.

hero.description: Joinha timu yeinjiniya inovaka yekucheka-kumucheto software yevatengi vepasirese. Shanda uri kure, kukura uchienderera mberi, uye ita mhedzisiro chaiyo.

process.title: Maitiro edu ekuhaya
process.description: Yakajeka, inoshanda, uye inoremekedza nguva yako

steps.title: Shandisa
steps.description: Tumira chikumbiro chako uye isu tichaongorora mukati me3 mazuva ebhizinesi.

steps.title: Yekutanga Chat
steps.description: Vhidhiyo yekufona kwemaminitsi e30 kuti utaure ruzivo rwako uye zvaunotarisira.

steps.title: Tekinoroji
steps.description: Kubvunzurudzwa kwehunyanzvi kana kurovedza muviri kunoshanda kuratidza hunyanzvi hwako.

steps.title: Kupa
steps.description: Sangana nechikwata uye ugamuchire chipo chako chekujoina Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Nzvimbo dzakavhurika
jobs.description: Tsvaga yako inotevera mukana uye ubatane nechikwata chedu chiri kukura

listings.title: Senior Full-Stack Injiniya
listings.description: Vaka scalable bhizinesi kunyorera uchishandisa React, Node.js, uye gore matekinoroji.

listings.title: DevOps Injiniya
listings.description: Gadzira uye chengetedza CI / CD mapaipi, zvivakwa sekodhi, uye masisitimu ekuongorora.

listings.title: AI / ML Injiniya
listings.description: Gadzira michina yekudzidza mamodheru uye AI mhinduro dzevatengi vebhizinesi.

listings.title: Chigadzirwa Mugadziri
listings.description: Gadzira yakanaka, inonzwisisika mushandisi zviitiko zveakaomarara mabhizinesi kunyorera.

listings.title: Solutions Architect
listings.description: Gadzira magumo-kusvika-kumagumo ehunyanzvi mhinduro uye tungamira vatengi kuburikidza neshanduko yedhijitari.

listings.title: Munyori wehunyanzvi
listings.description: Gadzira zvinyorwa zvakazara, tutorials, uye zvehunyanzvi zvemukati.

cta.title: Mibvunzo pamusoro pekushanda pano?
cta.description: Tinoda kunzwa kubva kwauri. Taura nesu uye isu tichapindura chero mibvunzo nezve hupenyu paHorizon Tech.

hero.description: Ongorora kuti takabatsira sei makambani mumaindasitiri ese kushandura mashandiro kuburikidza neanoshanda, epamusoro-anokanganisa tekinoroji.

items.title: Cloud Migration & Modernization
items.description: Kutamisa nhaka yebhangi masisitimu kune AWS gore zvivakwa pasina zero downtime.
items.challenge: Legacy monolithic architecture inokonzeresa scalability nyaya

items.title: AI-Powered Diagnostic Platform
items.description: Yakavakwa ML mamodheru ekurapa mifananidzo ongororo ine 95% + kurongeka.
items.challenge: Maitiro ekuongorora maoko anotora nguva yakareba

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Yakagadziridzwa BI chikuva kugadzirisa 10M + zviitiko zuva nezuva.
items.challenge: Iko hakuna chaiyo-nguva kuoneka mune akakosha bhizinesi metric

cta.title: Wagadzirira kunyora nyaya yako yekubudirira?
cta.description: Ngatikurukurei kuti tingakubatsira sei kuti uwane migumisiro yakafanana uye kukura nechivimbo.

filters.title: Indasitiri Filter
filters.empty: Hapana nyaya dzenyaya dzinoenderana neyakasarudzwa indasitiri firita.

hero.description: Dzidziso dzehunyanzvi, ruzivo rweindasitiri, uye zvidzidzo zvinoshanda kubva kune chaiyo yekuendesa basa.

featuredPost.title: Yakazara nzira kuchinyorwa: Linux Vakapindwa muropa » General » Noticias » Maitiro ekutarisa muna 2025
featuredPost.excerpt: Ongorora mafambiro azvino mugore-chizvarwa kuvandudza, kubva kune serverless zvivakwa kusvika kumucheto komputa.

posts.title: Kuvaka Scalable Microservices neAzure Kubernetes Service
posts.excerpt: Nhungamiro inoshanda yekugadzira uye kuendesa microservices uchishandisa AKS.

posts.title: Machine Learning in Production: Zvidzidzo Zvakadzidzwa
posts.excerpt: Zvidzidzo zvakaedzwa nemumunda kubva kuendesa ML mamodheru pachiyero.

posts.title: Pindura 19: Chii chitsva uye nei zvichikosha
posts.excerpt: Yakazara nzira kuchinyorwa: Linux Vakapindwa muropa » General » Noticias » Maitiro ekugadzirisa 19 maficha uye mashandiro ekuita

newsletter.title: Nyorera kune yedu Newsletter
newsletter.description: Gamuchira zvinyorwa zvazvino, dzidziso, uye ruzivo rwunotumirwa vhiki rega rega.

hero.title: Horizon Tech Engineering Blog
hero.description: Manotsi emunda uye mapatani anoshanda kubva kuzvikwata zvinovaka zvigadzirwa zveAI, masisitimu emabhizinesi, uye akavimbika gore mapuratifomu.

email.description: Ndokumbira utitumire email kune chero kubvunza

faqs.question: Ndeapi masevhisi anopihwa neHorizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Isu tinopa tsika software yekuvandudza, AI / ML mhinduro, gore dhizaini, DevOps, bhizinesi njere, uye IoT masevhisi.

faqs.question: Ndingaite sei kuti nditange chirongwa neHorizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Taura nesu kuburikidza nefomu kana email kune zvaunoda. Isu tinoronga kufona kwekutsvaga uye kugovana chikumbiro.

faqs.question: Iwe unopa rutsigiro rwenguva dzose uye kuchengetedza?
faqs.answer: Ehe. Isu tinopa rutsigiro uye mapakeji ekugadzirisa ayo anosanganisira bug fixes, chengetedzo yekuvandudza, uye kuvandudzwa kwemaficha.

education.title: Zviwanikwa zvehunyanzvi
education.subtitle: Nhungamiro, dzidziso, uye maitiro akanakisa kubva kuHorizon Tech timu

hub.title: Nzvimbo yekudzidza
hub.description: Ongorora edu akarongedzwa tekinoroji zviwanikwa pagore, AI / ML, DevOps, uye yazvino software yekuvandudza.
hub.note: Ichi chishandiso chakavakirwa pane chaicho chiitiko cheprojekiti uye chinovandudzwa nguva dzose.

categories.title: AI & Machine Learning

training.text: Unoda kudzidziswa kwechikwata here? Isu tinopa tsika mashopu pane gore dhizaini, DevOps, uye maitiro emazuva ano ekuendesa.

unauthorized.title: Kuwana Kunorambidzwa
unauthorized.description: Iwe hauna mvumo yekupinda pane ino peji. Taura nemutungamiriri wako kana iwe uchifunga kuti uku kukanganisa.
